calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed as to the remaining DOES pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgemnt
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Ory Sandel, Esq. appeared for Cross-plaintiffs Cal-State Surplus Insurance Agency, Inc. and Alexander Shkolnikov.
Witness Alexander Shkolnikov was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted Cross-defendants Stephen Sklar and Sysco General Insurance Services, Inc.
Default of Cross-Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages - $408,500.00
Prejudgment Interest - $5,779.29
Attorneys' fees - $64,075.00
Punitive damages - $100,000,.00
Costs - $4,758.64, for a total judgment in the amount of $483,112.93
Counsel to prepare and submit a judgment to dept. 514 by this afternoon.
